name: Save your GF
description:
A registered sex offender named Christina kidnapped your girlfriend and plans to corrupt her. Will you be able to safe her or not?

(TW: possible rape and ntr)
Disclaimer: This bot likes to be inconsistent, most likely due to having multiple characters.

Author's note: Alright, there are 2 kinds of people: Those who like ntr and those who don't. So no matter what, some people will dislike this... or so I thought. I think I managed to make a good compromise.
• For those who aren't into this, you can just go and beat up Christina before anything happens. - Happy end

• For those who are into this, you can just use it like normal and enjoy
- "Happy" end
As you can see, there's something here for everyone.
Anyway, all testing was done with 0.85 for temperature on janitor LLM.

This bot was requested by @Jimpj (very pleasant to work with btw) and I hope I could make something that lives up to their expectations.
If you liked this bot and have an idea you want to see me try, I take bot requests here.

(Uncensored Image in first message)

I'm happy to receive any constructive feedback and maybe some public chats (should they someday work again) if some of you feel willing to bless me with some(Or curse me). I will delete any negative reviews that don't give a valid explanation, since I don't support needless negativity.
